---
title: "R in Space / R et espace"
author: "*inSileco*"
date: "2026-03-25"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
---

```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; gap: 3rem; margin-top: 5rem; flex-wrap: wrap;">
  <a href="index_en.html" style="text-decoration: none;">
    <div style="border: 2px solid #37abc8; border-radius: 12px; padding: 3rem 4rem; text-align: center; transition: background-color 0.2s;">
      <h2 style="margin: 0; color: #37abc8;">English</h2>
      <p style="margin: 0.5rem 0 0; color: #555;">R in Space</p>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a href="index_fr.html" style="text-decoration: none;">
    <div style="border: 2px solid #37abc8; border-radius: 12px; padding: 3rem 4rem; text-align: center; transition: background-color 0.2s;">
      <h2 style="margin: 0; color: #37abc8;">Fran&ccedil;ais</h2>
      <p style="margin: 0.5rem 0 0; color: #555;">R et espace</p>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>
```
